description: Expanded validation corpus for Flying Star Calculator. Lookup/reference only; no formula derivation.
source_method: Manual/reference curation assisted by direct page/form extraction. Values are stored as reference data only, not generated by formulas.

test_cases.validation_notes: Wikibooks chart lists Mountain=S1, Facing=N1; raw cells converted from left-superscript/center/right-superscript to [mountain water base] as [right center left]. WOFS forum output cross-check matched after applying label mapping: WOFS w=mountain, b=water, m=base.

Wikibooks chart lists Mountain=S2, Facing=N2; raw cells converted from left-superscript/center/right-superscript to [mountain water base] as [right center left]. WOFS forum output cross-check matched after applying label mapping: WOFS w=mountain, b=water, m=base.

Wikibooks chart lists Mountain=S3, Facing=N3; raw cells converted from left-superscript/center/right-superscript to [mountain water base] as [right center left]. WOFS forum output cross-check matched after applying label mapping: WOFS w=mountain, b=water, m=base.
